---
title: "Analisis exploratorio"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r carga de datos}
load("datos/listings.RData")
ls()
```

```{r carga de paquetes}
library(nortest)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(cluster)
library(mclust)
library(NbClust)
library(factoextra)
library(hopkins)
library(GGally)
```

```{r primera vista a los datos}
colnames(listings)
dim(listings)
head(listings)
tipos_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(listings),
  Tipo = sapply(listings, class),
  row.names = NULL
)
View(tipos_df)
```
```{r resumen completo}
summary(listings)
```


```{r variables numéricas}
numericas <- c("accommodates","bathrooms","bedrooms","beds","host_response_rate","host_acceptance_rate","calculated_host_listings_count","number_of_reviews","reviews_per_month","review_scores_rating","minimum_nights","availability_365"
)

sapply(listings[numericas], class)
```
```{r convertir de character a numérico}
listings$host_response_rate <- gsub("%", "", listings$host_response_rate)
listings$host_response_rate[listings$host_response_rate == "N/A"] <- NA
listings$host_response_rate <- as.numeric(listings$host_response_rate)

listings$host_acceptance_rate <- gsub("%", "", listings$host_acceptance_rate)
listings$host_acceptance_rate[listings$host_acceptance_rate == "N/A"] <- NA
listings$host_acceptance_rate <- as.numeric(listings$host_acceptance_rate)
```

```{r verificar los NA}
colSums(is.na(listings[numericas]))
colSums(is.na(listings[numericas])) / nrow(listings)
```

```{r extraer parte numérica de los baños}
head(listings$bathrooms_text)
listings$bathrooms_num <- as.numeric(sub("[^0-9.].*", "",listings$bathrooms_text))
listings$bathrooms_num[grepl("Half", listings$bathrooms_text, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- 0.5

sum(is.na(listings$bathrooms_num))
listings$bathrooms_num[is.na(listings$bathrooms_num)] <- 
median(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r tomar la parte categórica de baños}
listings$bathroom_type <- ifelse(
  grepl("shared", listings$bathrooms_text, ignore.case = TRUE),
  "shared",
  "private"
)

listings$bathroom_type <- as.factor(listings$bathroom_type)
summary(listings$bathrooms_num)
table(listings$bathroom_type)
```

```{r eliminar otras variables de baños para no confundirlas}
listings$bathrooms_text <- NULL
listings$bathrooms <- NULL
```

```{r manejo de NA de otras variables}
listings$bedrooms[is.na(listings$bedrooms)] <- median(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$beds[is.na(listings$beds)] <- 
median(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$host_response_missing <- ifelse(is.na(listings$host_response_rate), 1, 0)
listings$host_response_rate[is.na(listings$host_response_rate)] <- 
mean(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$host_acceptance_missing <- ifelse(is.na(listings$host_acceptance_rate), 1, 0)
listings$host_acceptance_rate[is.na(listings$host_acceptance_rate)] <- 
mean(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$reviews_per_month[is.na(listings$reviews_per_month)] <- 0

listings$has_reviews <- ifelse(is.na(listings$review_scores_rating), 0, 1)
listings$review_scores_rating[is.na(listings$review_scores_rating)] <- 
mean(listings$review_scores_rating, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r verificar que ya no haya NA}

numericas_final <- c(
"accommodates",
"bathrooms_num",
"bedrooms",
"beds",
"host_response_rate",
"host_acceptance_rate",
"calculated_host_listings_count",
"number_of_reviews",
"reviews_per_month",
"review_scores_rating",
"minimum_nights",
"availability_365"
)

colSums(is.na(listings[, numericas_final]))
```
### Medidas de tendencia central

```{r}
# Media
sapply(listings[, numericas_final], mean, na.rm = TRUE)

# Mediana
sapply(listings[, numericas_final], median, na.rm = TRUE)

# Mínimo
sapply(listings[, numericas_final], min, na.rm = TRUE)

# Máximo
sapply(listings[, numericas_final], max, na.rm = TRUE)

# Cuantiles
lapply(listings[, numericas_final], quantile, na.rm = TRUE)
```
